description: Letter/petition concerning a legal affair involving the allocation of the estate of the late Bayān. (Same hand as Moss. VII,131 (PGPID 6955)?) Repeatedly mentions a sum of 40 dinars; provisions for the maintenance of the orphan and his (female) guarantor (kafīla); property or money that had been stored in Sindsīs (near al-Maḥalla); and wine.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
